strategy: Death boss (4130) fighting alongside Brulee Sucre. Hit with your strongest boosted school (Life works well into Death).
He buffs himself with Dark Pact and Empower, so his hits ramp. Keep healed and do not let the fight drag.
When you attack Claudas he Steal-Healths from Brulee to stay alive, and Brulee shields herself and Guidances him. Consider dropping Brulee first to cut off his heal source and buffs.
Stack blades and burst; both are low health.
cheatNotes: He Dark-Pacts himself for extra pips at the cost of health. Expect his hits sooner than his pips suggest.
He Empowers himself for more pips too, so his damage can spike. Stay topped up.
Attacking Claudas makes him Steal Health from Brulee to heal. Killing Brulee first removes his heal battery.
When Claudas blades, Brulee casts Guidance (accuracy), reducing his fizzle chance. Minor, just expect his hits to land.
Brulee shields herself with Spirit Armor after taking damage, so hit her hard enough to overkill the absorb.
